Transparent truck-space pricing

Honest Pricing. No Hidden Fees.

You only pay for the truck space you use. Text us photos for an exact quote in minutes.

Single Item

$50+

Great for one mattress, chair, appliance, or small pickup.

Small Load

$120-$300

A few bulky items, partial cleanout, or light garage load.

Medium Load

Most Popular
$250-$500

Full room, garage, move-out pile, or mixed household junk.

Large Load

$500-$820

Multiple rooms, estate cleanouts, or full truckload service.

What Our Customers Say

5.0 ⭐ on Google · Verified reviews

★★★★★

Silvia Rho

1 review · a month ago

"What an awesome first experience! I called to get an estimate on hauling away our huge piano — on the second floor! — and Valeriano and his partner were able to come that same day and haul it away. He was super efficient and so nice! Definitely will be telling my friends about this company."

★★★★★

Bella

3 reviews · a month ago

"I cannot recommend these two guys highly enough! They came to clean my in-laws' home, which had accumulated 15 years' worth of belongings. They managed to clear and clean the entire space in just 3 to 4 hours. Punctual, professional, thorough — they left the place spotless. Their rates are very reasonable and they work with the expertise of seasoned professionals. Worth every penny!"

★★★★★

Parin Shah

4 reviews · a month ago

"Excellent service from start to finish! I called to have my old garage refrigerator hauled away and he arrived within the hour. Kind, professional, and clearly knew what he was doing. Quick, hassle-free, and left the space spotless. It's rare to find someone this responsive. I'd absolutely call him again."

★★★★★

Sabina Anthony

"I highly recommend this team! They helped us move a large amount of very heavy office furniture and made the entire process seamless. Extremely careful with every piece. Their expertise in disassembling and reassembling furniture was impressive. Trustworthy, hardworking, and respectful throughout the entire project."

We Treat Your Home — and the Planet — With Care.

Our team sorts every job: gently used furniture goes to local South Bay charities, electronics are properly recycled, and yard waste is composted. We recycle or donate up to 60% of every load.

♻️ Recycle First 🤝 Donate Locally 🌱 Responsible Disposal

Got Questions? We've Got Answers.

We charge based on truck space, starting at $50 for a single item up to $820 for a full truckload. Additional fees apply for stairs, disassembly, or difficult access — we always tell you upfront. Text us photos for an exact price in minutes.

Yes — items on the 2nd floor or higher require extra labor and may have an additional fee. The same applies to tight access, long carries, or elevator-only buildings. We'll always quote this upfront before we start.

Yes, there's a small additional fee for items that need to be disassembled — like bed frames, trampolines, large desks, or exercise equipment. Just let us know when you request your quote.

Yes! Text or call us early in the day for the best chance of same-day pickup. We work 7 days a week.

Absolutely not. Our crew comes to wherever the items are — inside the house, garage, backyard — and hauls everything out. You don't move a single thing.

Yes. South Bay Junk Removal is fully licensed and insured. We're a family-owned local business and we stand behind every single job.
